summary: Loading state displays correctly with proper heading and mobile layout. Screen meets required loading state contract from screen spec.

violations.description: Admin interface uses dark background which appears to follow app chrome styling rather than public marketing palette, but this separation is expected per the manifesto requirement that public legal/marketing palette and signed-in app chrome remain visually separated

actions: Verify loading state transitions properly to success/error states
Confirm search and filter controls become interactive after loading completes
Test horizontal scroll behavior for table content at 390px viewport
